prompt: Generate an infographic diagram of a rice boiler with labeled parts. Use the clean illustrated style, warm color palette, and clear diagrammatic layout from the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate an infographic diagram detailing the parts of a rice boiler. The layout should mirror the clear, infographic diagrammatic style of image 1, featuring a main diagram on the right side of the canvas. Utilize the clean, illustrated aesthetic, warm color palette, and a subtle textured background as seen in image 1. Each component of the rice boiler must be clearly labeled with text and a connecting dashed line, replicating the precise labeling convention from image 1.
objects: Illustrated diagram of a rice boiler on the right side
Text labels for rice boiler components
Dashed lines connecting labels to components
Main title text block on the left side
Smaller introductory text line on the left side
